description: CompositionBlue check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar and a full buttoned placket, short puffed sleeves, two patch pockets with buttoned closures on the chest, metal buttons and a curved hemFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis season's understated trend is perfectly captured in this plaid checked shirt with its plush fabric. The button detailing in this piece gives it an interesting dimension. Style this shirt from s.oliver with jeggings, closed-toe casual shoes, and a structured blazer.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
